diagrams.title: Warshall's Algorithm Iterations
diagrams.description: Shows how the path matrix evolves through k=1,2,3 iterations for a sample 3-vertex graph
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how transitive closure is computed step by step

diagrams.title: Floyd's Algorithm Iterations
diagrams.description: Shows distance matrix transformation through each intermediate vertex k
elements: Initial D(0) matrix with edge weights
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how shortest paths are discovered progressively

diagrams.title: Comparison Matrix
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of Warshall's vs Floyd's algorithm characteristics
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for differences between the two algorithms

diagrams.title: Path Through k Visualization
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how Floyd's checks if path i→k→j is shorter than i→j
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the key operation in Floyd's algorithm
